programme.title: Arnold Palmer Invitational p/b Mastercard Round 3
programme.desc: The Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard is one of the premier-event jewels on the PGA Tour. It is played at the Bay Hill Club and Lodge, a private golf resort owned since 1974 by Arnold Palmer in Bay Hill, a suburb southwest of Orlando, Florida. The winner receives a red cardigan sweater in memory of Arnold Palmer, a tradition that began with the 2017 tournament after Palmer's death

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Elimination Game
programme.desc: Navy SEAL Rick is sentenced to rot in a military prison until he is offered the opportunity to put his life on the line and win his freedom in a kill or be killed reality show. Rick will have to eliminate some of the world's most notorious killers on live TV to gain his freedom and clear his name. Can he succeed finally?

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Army of One
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Brenner and her husband stumble upon an illegal drug compound in the woods while hiking. The drug dealers capture them, kill her husband, and leave her for dead. programme.desc: Phi, a veteran boxer, sets out on a quest for revenge after the ruthless crime lord Ba Rau killed his wife. His journey takes him into the remote village near Foggy Mountain, where he discovers Ba Rau's human trafficking activities. The final showdown is inevitable as Phi must take down Ba Rau to save the villagers and avenge his wife’s death.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman bersetuju jika Aniq menjadi pengganti Tuan Budi, tetapi meletakkan satu syarat yang mungkin akan membongkar rahsia Aniq. Nadia rasa Benjamin perlu memihak kepada Aniq.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang 3 remaja wanita dari latarbelakang keluarga yang berbeza mengejar gelaran Ratu Tenpin Negara.

programme.title: Bunga Hati
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Lara Perindu
programme.desc: Firasat ingin tahu seorang anak akhirnya membawanya ke sebuah perkampungan nelayan dimana dia mempelajari kisah percintaan ibubapanya dahulu. Adakah dia akhirnya berjaya menemui bapanya?.

programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. Pearce looks back at some of the highs and lows of a playing career that took him from Nottingham Forest to Newcastle, West Ham, and Manchester City, who he would then go on to manage in memorable fashion.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Since joining Liverpool in 2023, Cody Gakpo has become a key figure at Anfield - playing a major role in their Premier League title win last season. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Netherlands international to learn about his rise, at the PSV academy from the age of six, to winning one of football's biggest prizes.

programme.title: LIV v TOT
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Prem

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Aaron Ramsey was one of Arsenal's key players for a decade under Arsene Wenger. The Welshman's influence and technical ability made him one of the Premier League's standout talents in midfield. He looks back on some of his highlights.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: A strange noblewoman arrives in a remote mountain village, claiming one of five youths is the reincarnation of an ancient power who once destroyed the world - and will do so again, if she's not able to discover which of them it is. But they all have less time than they think.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission - and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man busily promotes Ten Meridian Moves. He still thinks of Wing-sum. Wing-sum suspects she has breast cancer, and the examination results are released. Wai-man suggests Wing-sum undergo breast acupuncture treatment, but Wing-sum is apprehensive.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ching-chi abruptly has chest pain. After receiving treatment, Ching-chi insists on working while keeping Kam-kuk in the dark. Ka-chun is worried. programme.title: Legend of the Magnate

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her partner, Dodo, received a mandate, namely someone who left a luxury car in their office for 2 weeks. Then Intan and Dodo planned to take the car back home. Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in his hometown. Intan claims to be a rich man. On the other hand, Dodo claims to be the owner of the car and flirts with girls in the village, even though Dodo is actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Asap Neng Sate Bau-Bau Cinta
programme.desc: Bintang is willing to replace Doni to be matched for money but Bintang (Eza Gionino) is surprised, because the girl who was matched with Doni his boss was Alya (Jenniver Eve) the satay seller, who has always not gotten along with him.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta

programme.title: SUMPAH I LOVE YOU FULL
programme.desc: Blaming arranged marriages after witnessing her aunt's divorce, Putri vowed never to be set up in one herself. On her first day at work, Putri didn't make a good impression; instead, she scolded a director at the company where she worked named Riko. Riko deliberately gave Putri a lot of work to do. When he got home, Riko was shocked to find out that the person he had been working with was Boi's da

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but her best friend suddenly faints because she cannot accept that Ara is marrying her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). Because she cares about her friend, Ara runs away with Sam (Fauzan Nasrul). programme.title: Dari The Kita Belajar Rasa Penghalau Galau
programme.desc: Galih (Cakrawala Airawan) and Reva (Larasati Nugroho) always argue whenever they meet. Reva even throws away Galih’s motorcycle key, making him furious. programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Puncline DAC
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi
programme.desc: Pertunjukan komedi lakaran yang memaparkan kemasyhuran pelawak Dato Afdlin Shauki dan Harun Salim Bachik dari Boboi.

programme.title: Bujang 40
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .
